instruction: The parser in ~/Desktop/report_parser/parser.py is supposed to turn simple key:value report text into a dictionary, but it currently mishandles blank lines. Read the issue description in ISSUE.txt, open the Python splitlines documentation in Chrome, and fix parser.py in VS Code so the provided tests pass. After the fix, create ~/Desktop/report_parser/PARSER_FIXED.txt with the exact text `parser fixed`.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/report_parser')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(base / 'ISSUE.txt').write_text('Ignore blank lines when parsing key:value pairs.\n')
(base / 'parser.py').write_text("""def parse_report(text):
    result = {}
    for line in text.split('\n'):
        key, value = line.split(':')
        result[key.strip()] = value.strip()
    return result
""")
(base / 'test.py').write_text("""from parser import parse_report

def test():
    data = parse_report('title: Quarterly Review\n\nowner: Alice\nstatus: done\n')
    assert data == {'title': 'Quarterly Review', 'owner': 'Alice', 'status': 'done'}
""")
PY
